notes: Videos works fine. Install MS Net 4.0 via protontricks (protontricks 105000 dotnet40)
title: A New Beginning - Final Cut

notes: If you have no audio in the cutscenes use the launch option "SDL_AUDIODRIVER=winmm %command%" and avoid using proton 3.16beta. The config tool needs .net4.0, but you can edit the file "config.ini" directly instead. It's located in ".../steamapps/compatdata/105000/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/Local Settings/Application Data/Daedalic Entertainment/A New Beginning - Final Cut"
title: A New Beginning - Final Cut

notes:
For sound in videos please force Proton 3.16-4 for this game and add launch options 'SDL_AUDIODRIVER=winmm PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=40 %command%'
There is no video sound volume slider in game and the external configuration tool does not work, but you can just edit the 'config.ini' in your game directory to suit your needs.
Game runs perfectly after these tweaks.
title: A New Beginning - Final Cut

notes: No sound in the intro.  There is sound in the game.
title: A New Beginning - Final Cut

notes: Game runs perfectly using Proton 3.16.4. I didn't need to use any tweaks or launch options. Cut-scene audio even works without using the tweaks mentioned below. Sometimes the beginning of a sentence would get cut off but it is an extremely minor issue. Only problem is that Alt-Tab doesn't work properly, but the game itself runs perfectly.
title: A New Beginning - Final Cut

cpu: AMD Ryzen 3 2200G with Radeon Vega Graphics
